title: tabernanthe iboga
intro: Tabernanthe iboga, also known as iboga, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Central Africa, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Iboga has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, where its medicinal properties include its ability to induce a deep state of consciousness, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as an anti-inflammatory. The health benefits of iboga include its potential to treat addiction, improve sleep quality, and reduce symptoms of depression and anxiety. Iboga is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as tea, capsules, and extracts, although its use is heavily regulated due to concerns about its potential for abuse.
